items.description: Clients can't find you online. Your competition with a website is getting your potential customers.
items.solution: Professional website from 999 KM — ready in 4-6 weeks.

items.description: It looks like it's from 2015. Doesn't work on mobile. Slow. Clients leave for the competition.
items.solution: Redesign that modernizes your look and improves results.

items.description: Your products are great, but you only sell locally. The internet can open up all of BiH for you.
items.solution: Online store from 2,499 KM — your products available to everyone.

ai.sectionTitle: While you're at the fair — who's answering your customers?
ai.sectionSubtitle: Three simple solutions for guesthouses, farmers and tourism workers who want less manual work

items.problem: Customer asks about prices — you're busy.
items.solution: Your assistant knows your prices, availability and services. It replies to customers and guests while you work, travel or sleep.

items.problem: Same papers and spreadsheets every week.
items.solution: See your most successful weeks, which product earns the most and where you're losing income — no copying and counting.
items.outcome: Five minutes of review instead of an hour of paperwork.

items.problem: Did you send the guest a confirmation?
items.solution: Booking, inquiry or order — the guest gets a confirmation immediately. Without you remembering, typing or sending manually.
items.outcome: Guest is confident. You are free.
